svg.text: Grounding Benchmark: packet/prompt time vs prompt-bundle input
The main field is zoomed to the dense scenario cluster so long-tail cases do not flatten the rest. Left and down
is better for prompt-bundle input and packet time.
Static chart: Focus window | 37 of 37 scenarios in frame
Main field caps at 200 prompt-bundle input tokens and 10 ms to keep the dense cluster legible.
Each line links the same benchmark

No scenarios spill past the focus
